name: Microcosm Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Microcosm Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and supplies upstream materials for the electronic industry. It offers PSPI-Brina, a high precision photosensitive developing type Polyimide material; liquid and film type colorless polyimide material for OLED display screens, and other colorless and flexible required electronic products; and high frequency series products. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tainan, Taiwan.
